DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KAREN MONTALBANO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to file a substantive opposition. The court transfers this action to the limited jurisdiction court per agreement of the parties. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
